title: Monkey-Style Cursors
description: Replaces the Cursor with a Monkey Hand!
body:
# Monkey-Style Cursors
This is a simple resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default cursor with a monkey hand!  

Requires the [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod  
This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Cursor Mod. Make sure to install this mod!  

Has static cursors for the animated busy and not allowed cursors.  

![monkey style cursors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/neySY92f/images/25b9948ce9f3c27538f31408dca46f45f0226b75.gif)
